why: Persist searchable index to durable storage for query access
output: Database write confirmation with row count and file path

success_handling.criteria: All index entries are written to SQLite and database file is valid

error_handling.criteria: SQLite write throws error (SQLITE_BUSY, SQLITE_FULL, permission denied)

decisions.reason: Migrations use versioned MIGRATIONS array tracked by schema_migrations table
decisions.rationale: Versioned migrations (v1–v3 as of this date) replace PRAGMA table_info() column checks. write-database receives an already-migrated db — it never runs or checks migrations itself. Future schema changes add a new version entry to the MIGRATIONS array in database.ts.
